NEW CONCEPT Recommended

Full-Screen Showroom Experience

A full-screen showroom upgrade featuring a curved LED display wrapping the front and right walls, plus a dedicated LED screen on the left wall.

Floor Plan — Top View

Top view of the showroom: curved LED screen wrapping from the front wall to the right wall, entrance opening (1.00 m), and left wall dimensions (2.48 m total height, existing wall 1.00 m + LED screen strip 0.84 m).

ElementDimension

Video Walkthrough
Concept Summary
Curved Screen
Wraps continuously from the front wall to the right wall for an immersive, seamless display.
Left Wall Screen
Dedicated LED strip above the entrance opening, complementing the curved display.
How will we reflect our products?

CASHIN H3 devices can be linked directly to the LED screens, so every live transaction is mirrored on the big screen in real time.

Live Device-to-Screen Sync
Every action on a CASHIN H3 device — a receipt, a QR code, a completed payment — appears instantly and in sync on the large screen in front of the visitor.
Live Proof of Concept
Instead of watching a recorded video, visitors see the real device working and the screen reflecting that exact moment — real proof the technology works, not just a marketing reel.
Scalable Across Devices
The same linking concept extends to any number of H3 units, with the screen showing data from one device or rotating across several.
A Stronger Visitor Experience
Decision-makers and prospective clients see the technology running live in front of them, making the showroom visit far more convincing than a narrated or simulated demo.
Total Investment
USD 27,014
Approx. SAR 101,303 — combined quoted value
ItemSizeCost (USD)
Main Flexible LED Screen6.08 m × 2.40 m25,409
Secondary Left-Side Flexible LED Screen0.64 m × 2.40 m1,605
Total — Combined27,014

Approx. SAR 101,303. The main screen is quoted DDP; the secondary left-side screen is quoted EXW — the total above is the combined quoted value of both. Includes: main & secondary LED screens, Nova TU4K Pro controller, steel frame, shipping, insurance, customs clearance, travel & installation, spare parts, and a 3-year warranty.

Key Features
Premium Technology Appearance
Creates a modern, premium, technology-driven environment that better reflects CASHIN as a digital transformation and fintech company.
Stronger Brand Image
Large digital screens provide a more professional and impressive experience than static designs or physical mockups.
More Professional Than Physical Models
Full-screen digital content creates a cleaner, more advanced presentation than physical models and decorative structures.
Greater Content Flexibility
Content can be updated instantly for products, demos, presentations, events, and campaigns without changing the physical showroom.
Lower Overall Cost
Compared with the original concept's construction, fabrication, and glass work, this solution delivers stronger visual impact at a lower total cost.
No Structural Work Required
Works within the existing room structure — no wall demolition, glass removal, glass replacement, or major construction.
Faster Implementation
A cleaner, faster installation process with significantly less disruption to the office.
Future-Proof Investment
The showroom can evolve through software and content updates instead of costly physical modifications later on.
Challenges with the Original Showroom Concept
Higher Overall Cost
Requires additional construction, custom decorative elements, physical models, fabrication, finishing, and installation — a significantly higher total cost.
Glass Removal and Replacement
Requires removing the existing glass partition and installing new glass, increasing complexity, time, risk, and office disruption.
Insufficient Space
Even after replacing the glass partition, the available room size would still not be sufficient for the intended showroom experience and visual impact.
More Complex Execution
Involves multiple contractors, construction stages, custom fabrication, structural coordination, and a longer implementation process.
Limited Future Flexibility
Physical designs and models are difficult and costly to update whenever products, branding, or presentation requirements change.
Executive Recommendation

Recommended Option: Full LED Screen Solution

Based on the available room size, implementation complexity, total investment, visual quality, flexibility, and long-term value, the Full LED Screen Solution is the recommended option. It delivers a stronger visual and technological impact while avoiding unnecessary construction work and space limitations.

  • A stronger technology-focused brand image
  • A more professional executive showroom
  • Lower implementation cost
  • No glass removal or replacement
  • No structural demolition
  • Faster and cleaner deployment
  • Greater flexibility for future content updates
  • Better long-term return on investment
